description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the npetrovsky/docker-android-sdk-ndk Docker image and defines three stages: buildRelease, deploy, and testBuild. In the buildRelease stage add a buildReleaseApp job that runs before_script commands: chmod +x ./gradlew, decode $setUpSigning into prepareConfig.sh, make it executable, execute it, replace the placeholder in app_pub_key with ${playApiKey} using sed, and install zip via apt-get update && apt-get install -y zip; then script commands: ./gradlew assemblePlaystoreRelease, move the generated APK to releases/${fileName}, write $CI_JOB_ID to releases/ScreenCam-JobID.txt, change directory to magisk and run ./buildMagiskModule.sh $magiskModuleName, produces an artifact named ScreenCam-V($CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME)-Play containing releases/ScreenCam* and runs only on tags. In the deploy stage add a deployReleaseApp job that decodes $pushScript into deploy.sh in before_script and executes sh deploy.sh, depends on buildReleaseApp, and also runs only on tags. In the testBuild stage add a testBuild job that uses the same Docker image, runs before_script chmod +x ./gradlew, then script ./gradlew assembleFdroidDebug, stores app/build/outputs/ as an artifact, runs on pushes but not on tags, and sets GIT_SUBMODULE_STRATEGY to recursive. Finally include the SAST.gitlab-ci.yml template and a sast job in the testBuild stage.
